title: Deliverable Schema Foundation
description: Schematizes the DELIVERABLE contract itself (memory rule #16 DLP-STRATEGY). Authors schemas/deliverable.schema.json, establishes schemas/_instances/deliverables/ as the canonical instance namespace, and backfills four retro instances (D-0 plus three 2026-05-30 deliverables) so the registry is comprehensive from day one.

outputs.description: schemas/deliverable.schema.json v1.0.0 — Draft 7 schema for the DELIVERABLE contract.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates as Draft 7 via ajv-cli@5 compile --strict=false
Required fields: id, version, title, description, authority, lifecycleState, scope, outputs, validation, transitions
File exists at the canonical instance path

outputs.description: .refsignore updated to exclude _instances/** so refs rebuild does not index instance files as schemas.
acceptanceCriteria: luhtech-schema refs rebuild --check exit 0 after instances added (proving exclusion works)
schema-refs.json does not gain instance entries

outputs.description: D-0 backfill: schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-05-31-luhtech-schema-refs-rebuild.json with full lifecycle state populated from git history.
acceptanceCriteria: transitions array reflects merge from git history

outputs.description: Three 2026-05-30 retro instances populated with git history: schema-registry-eb-roadmap-cleanup, followup-register-full-conformance, eb-required-ci-debt-clearance.
acceptanceCriteria: Three instance files exist under schemas/_instances/deliverables/
transitions arrays reflect each deliverable's merge history

preMerge: ajv-cli@5 validate -s schemas/deliverable.schema.json -d schemas/_instances/deliverables/*.json succeeds for all instances
luhtech-schema refs rebuild --check exits 0 after instance files added
postMerge: main shows schemas/_instances/deliverables/ populated with instances
schema-refs.json on main contains deliverable entry
schema-refs.json on main does NOT contain entries for any _instances/* files
luhtech-schema refs rebuild --check exits 0 on main

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored by chat; L4 approval received via PROCEED STEP 2

notes: First instance of deliverable.schema.json. Self-referential bootstrap — this spec is an instance of the schema the deliverable authored. Establishes _instances/ namespace pattern reusable for D-3 rule instances at schemas/_instances/rules/.
